Yes, Europe banned titanium dioxide, an ingredient in Skittles, from being used in food
Beginning Aug. 7, food manufacturers in Europe won’t be able to use titanium dioxide, a color additive. But that doesn’t mean the ingredient is toxic to humans.
Yes, hot weather can damage asphalt runways
Airports in the U.K. briefly had to shut down runways due to heat-related damage. Here’s how that’s possible and why it doesn’t constantly happen in hotter climates.
